chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 25 of 2025 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No. 3260/2025. 2. For hearing of Main Petition. 07.04.2026. Mr. Sher Ali Rizvi, Advocate alongwith Mr. Sanaullah Abbasi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Furqan Ali, Advocate for the Respondent.......... Learned counsel for the Petitioner has submitted a Statement and has stated that since the purposes for which the instant JCM was filed have been fulfilled, the instant Petition has become infructuous. Accordingly, the said JCM No. 25/2025 stands dismissed with listed application. J U D G E Ayaz
